prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I do not have real-time market data, access to financial models, or the ability to predict future stock movements with certainty. The point estimate assumes a slight, negligible drift from the current price due to the absence of any other information, such as historical trends, news, or broader market conditions. The confidence intervals are constructed to reflect increasing uncertainty with higher confidence levels, acknowledging that stock prices can fluctuate.
